title: Deploy to production and provide live app link

requirements.text: Trigger a production deployment so the current Restaurant Inventory app build is live (production), and confirm the production frontend can reach the production backend without showing connectivity errors.

quotes: no just make it live and provide me the link to use it

acceptanceCriteria: Production deployment completes successfully (no generic "Deployment error").
Opening the production frontend loads the app without a backend connection error.
On production: a user can create/save a Daily Entry record for a selected Balance Date and then view that record in History and Record Details.

requirements.text: Provide the live (production) app URL for the deployed frontend in a repo file named LIVE_URL.md (English text), and ensure the link is the one end-users should open in a browser.

quotes: no just make it live and provide me the link to use it

acceptanceCriteria: A LIVE_URL.md file exists at the repository root.
LIVE_URL.md contains the full production URL (including https://) that loads the deployed app when opened in a browser.

constraints: Respect the single-actor backend architecture (all Motoko logic in backend/main.mo).
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui or other frontend immutablePaths listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT.
nonGoals: Adding new product features beyond making the current app live and providing the live link.
Changing ingredient lists, record formats, or UI layout (unless required to resolve a deployment/production connectivity blocker).
